Thursday June 11th

Office Move In
Time Activity
8:00 AM – 10:00 AM

BVI and DHH Summer Academy Equipment picked up from Altoona and delivered to Stuart Hall

10:00 AM – 12:00 PM

Move into Summer Academy Office

  • Organize Equipment
  • Organize Curriculum Equipment
  • Prep for RA Arrival
12:00 PM – 1:00 PM

Lunch
1:00 PM – 5:00 PM

Set up Summer Academy Office and Rooms

  • Organize Equipment
  • Organize Curriculum Equipment
  • Prep for RA Arrival
5:00 PM

Finish for the day

Friday June 12th

RD and RA Arrival
Time Activity
9:30 AM – 6:00 PM

Office Set Up

Prep for RD Arrival
11:00 AM – 12:00 PM

RD Arrival at Stuart Hall

  • Drop Belongings at Dorm
  • Park at Designated Parking Deck
  • Check in at Summer Academy Office - Stuart Hall
  • (RDs should plan to eat Lunch on their own before training begins at 1:00pm)
12:00 PM – 1:00 PM

Lunch
1:00 PM – 4:30 PM

RD Training
4:30 PM – 6:00 PM

RA Arrival

  • Drop Belongings at Dorm
  • Park at Designated Parking Deck
  • Check in at Summer Academy Office - Stuart Hall
6:00 PM

Dinner On Your Own

Time Activity
7:00 AM – 10:00 AM

Breakfast

Findlay Commons

12:30 PM – 1:30 PM

Lunch

Findlay Commons

217 Business Bldg. Autumn Spotts

2:15 PM – 4:45 PM

5:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Dinner - Simulated BVI

Findlay Commons Holly Short, Mindy Miller, Doug Yeager

Time Activity
7:00 AM – 8:15 AM

Breakfast

Findlay Commons
9:00 AM – 12:00 PM

RA Training / RA Training Basics

217 Business Building
12:00 PM – 1:00 PM

Lunch

Findlay Commons – Simulated Lunch
1:00 PM – 3:45 PM

RA Training ASL and Comm Access Basics

217 Business Bldg. Nick Mastromatteo, Shasta Dreese

3:45 PM - 4:45 PM

RA Training Student Move In Procedures

217 Business Bldg. Holly Short, Doug Yeager, Kiley Foley

5:00 PM - 6:00 PM

Dinner Simulated DHH

Findlay Commons Nick Mastromatteo, Shasta Dreese

Monday June 15th

Student Arrival Day
Time Activity
7:00AM–8:45AM

RA Breakfast

Findlay Commons
10:00AM–11:00AM

RAs: Finish Preparing for Student Arrival
11:00AM-11:30AM

RA Lunch/Finish Prep for Student Arrival

Location TBD
1:00 PM – 2:00 PM

Drop off Student’s Belongings at Dorm

Parents should go to “Student Lot 82”, RAs will assist to unload student’s belongings into bins. Student’s belongings will be secure and locked in their dorm room until they arrive.

***Medications should remain in the vehicle with parents and students***

1:00 PM

Parent/Student Check-In Greeting & Mingling

Business Bldg. Atrium
1:00 PM – 2:30 PM

Check- In Station #1 RN Medication Station

217 Business Bldg. Brightstar Staff

Check-In Station #2 Student Pre-Test

215 Business Bldg. Becky Knaub

Low Vision Interviews

214 Business Bldg.

Emily Vasile, Michael Troilo
2:30 PM

Parents and Students say “Good-Bye”
2:30 PM – 3:00 PM

Student Welcome Meeting

  • Student Rules and Procedures
  • Student Introductions / Ice Breakers
  • Schedule for Evening
  • Snacks and Drinks

217 Business Bldg.
3:00 PM – 4:30 PM

Travel as a Group to Stuart Hall

  • Student Room Familiarization
  • Unpacking
  • Fire Evacuation Route with O&Ms

Holly Short, Doug Yeager, Jacki Morell, Mindy Miller
5:00 PM – 6:15 PM

Dinner

Findlay Commons

O&Ms: Holly Short, Doug Yeager, Jacki Morell, Mindy Miller

6:30 PM – 8:00 PM

Evening Team Building Activity K Towers

217 Business Bldg.
8:00 PM – 8:45 PM

Students Unpack / Complete Pre-Test

Stuart Hall
9:00 PM – 10:30 PM

Showers and Chill Time
10:30 PM

Lights Out

Monday June 22nd

Time Activity
6:30 AM

Wake up
7:00 AM - 8:00 AM

Stuart Hall
8:15 AM - 9:15 AM

Breakfast

Findlay Commons

packed up by nursing staff
9:15 AM - 11:00 AM

Stuart Hall Lobby
9:30 AM - 11:00 AM

9:30 AM - 11:00 AM

Table/Tent #1

11:00 AM

ALL BVI STUDENTS MUST BE PICKED UP NO LATER THAN 11:00 AM

11:00 AM - 2:00 PM
